title: Tesserakt
description: This mod add a Tesserakt : this device allow you to transport energy, items, fluids and redstone beetween distances and dimensions!
body:
This mod add a Tesserakt : this device allow you to transport energy, items, fluids and redstone beetween distances and dimensions!
You can create up to 1000 different channel and label them as well as controlling inputs and outputs...

 

It is similar to the Tesseract from the mod Thermal Expension.

 

But there is more!

Dimensional bag : A backpack leading you to an extensible Pocket Dimension

Exponential Battery : a battery constantly expanding it's capacity!


Credits : the COFH team for all the textures of the original tesseract that I have slightly modified and used for this mod.

 

Features:

In GUI configurable frequency, label list to rember your frequencies, controllable in/out for each transported Object:

Energy, Fluids and Items modes:

-Disabled : don't transport at all

-Input : only allow insertion in the tesserakt, tubes won't be able to pull ressource.

-Output: only allow extraction from the tesserakt, tubes won't be able to push ressource.

-In/Out : allow both

 

Redstone mode :

-Disabled: don't react at all to redstone

-Input : copy redstone strenght input

-Output: emit redstone depending on tesserakts in input mod on the same frequency.

-Control : don't transmit redstone, instead redstone connect and disconnect the tesseract

 

Transmitted energy is FE : forge energy (universal for most of the mods).

Fluids and items should be universal too.

 

Filling frames:

You have to fill empty frames with Liquid Ender (Resonant Ender for thermal expension)

You can fill them by right clicking with bucks or other fluid-holding items, or by pumping fluid in it with other mods tubes;

Frame will emit a comparator output from 0 to 4 depending on the level of liqui they contains.

 

For the crafts to work, you need to have Thermal Foundation installed, else you will have to do your own recipes.
